# Paul Buramensky

> Lead Front-End Engineer with 15+ years of experience based in Berlin, Germany.
> UX-driven, AI-fluent, framework-agnostic. Most experienced with React and Vue.
> This is Paul's personal website and online CV.

Paul is a Lead Front-End Engineer who translates deep UX expertise and business understanding
into outstanding, user-centric products. He is framework-agnostic (React, Vue, Next.js, Astro),
product-oriented, and operates as a player-coach driving team execution.

## Key Pages
- [Online CV](https://paulbu.com/cv/): Interactive CV with experience, skills, and education
- [Full Resume (Markdown)](https://paulbu.com/paul-buramensky-resume.md): Complete resume in plain Markdown, suitable for LLM consumption
- [Resume (PDF)](https://paulbu.com/paul-buramensky-resume.pdf): Downloadable resume in PDF format
